howto.title: How to Download APK from Google Play

step1.title: Copy the Google Play link
step1.desc: Find any app on the Google Play Store and copy its URL from the address bar.

step2.title: Paste and generate
step2.desc: Paste the link into the input box above and click the Generate Link button.

step3.title: Download your APK
step3.desc: Click the download link and save the APK file. Install it on your Android device.

homeFaqs.q: How do I download APK from Google Play?
homeFaqs.a: Just paste the Google Play link on this page and click Generate Link. Your APK download will be ready in seconds.

homeFaqs.q: Is it safe to download APK files?
homeFaqs.a: Yes, our tool fetches files directly from Google's servers. The APKs are 100% original and unmodified.

homeFaqs.q: Do I need to install anything?
homeFaqs.a: No. gptoapk.com works entirely in your browser. No extensions, no software needed.

faq.title: FAQ - APK Downloader | gptoapk.com
faq.metaDesc: Frequently asked questions about downloading APK from Google Play Store using gptoapk.com. Learn how it works, security, and troubleshooting tips.

items.a: gptoapk.com is a free online tool that allows you to generate APK download links directly from Google Play Store. Just paste a Google Play URL or package name and get a direct download link instantly.
Yes, completely free. No registration, no hidden fees, no premium plans.
When you paste a Google Play link, our server fetches the APK file directly from Google's CDN and provides you with a download link. We never modify or store the files.

items.q: Is it safe to download APK from gptoapk.com?
items.a: Absolutely. Files are fetched directly from Google's servers. We never touch or modify the files, so you get 100% original, signature-verified APKs.

items.q: Can I download APK on my phone?
items.a: Yes! Just open gptoapk.com in your mobile browser and paste the link. It works on both phones and computers.

items.q: Does it work for paid apps?
items.a: Yes, but you need to have purchased the app on your Google account for it to generate a valid download link.

items.q: Do I need to install any software or browser extensions?
items.a: No. gptoapk.com works entirely in your browser. No downloads, no extensions, no plugins needed.

items.q: Can I download APK files from any country?
items.a: Yes, gptoapk.com works worldwide. However, some apps may be region-restricted on Google Play.
